notes: 0.9.12 reunites two lines of work: the v0.9.11 print-production pipeline together with a new frame-server video export engine. Print production carries forward unchanged: real color-managed CMYK export with embedded ICC output intents, PDF/X-4 and PDF/X-1a with named /Separation spot-color plates, vector (not rasterized) text in PDF/X, and real Adobe IDML export (an honest error instead of silent garbage when a real .idml can't yet be parsed on import). The rebrand to Sloom Studio and Japanese localization now run at the app level, not just the site. New in 0.9.12: the video engine's exporter now renders through the same frame-by-frame code path used for the live preview instead of an ffmpeg filter graph, cutting export time substantially on longer timelines; cross-track clip dragging, an overlay track kind, and animated-GIF export carry forward from 0.9.11. Windows packaging is NSIS (.exe); Linux is AppImage and .deb.
